headline: Shares of airline stocks are trading lower after the U.S. and Israel jointly attacked Iran over the weekend. Investors are assessing the risk that the conflict will spread to affect global travel routes.

headline: Delta, United, American Stocks Sink As U.S.–Israel Strikes On Iran Disrupt Air Travel
summary: Airline stocks are under pressure after joint U.S.–Israel military strikes on Iran led to regional airspace closures, a sharp rise in oil prices and thousands of canceled flights.

raw.headline: Delta, United, American Stocks Sink As U.S.–Israel Strikes On Iran Disrupt Air Travel
raw.summary: Airline stocks are under pressure after joint U.S.–Israel military strikes on Iran led to regional airspace closures, a sharp rise in oil prices and thousands of canceled flights.

headline: Travel stocks fall after thousands of flights grounded following Iran strikes
summary: Airlines and some hotel stocks fell after the U.S.-Israeli attacks on Iran and subsequent retaliation strikes.
